title: Whistleblower Dave Grusch: Oppenheimer's Involvement With UFOs
summary: Whistleblower Dave Grusch discusses Oppenheimer's involvement with UFOs and how Manhattan Project secrecy protocols were overlaid onto UAP-related programs. He explains the connection between the Atomic Energy Act and UAP secrecy, noting that Manhattan Project personnel were receiving UFO reports.

events.description: McMahon Act passed, predecessor to the Atomic Energy Act of 1954

key_claims.claim: The Schumer Amendment cites the McMahon Act of 1946 and references Department of Energy trans classified nuclear information
Manhattan Project personnel overlaid the same secrecy ecosystem used for nuclear secrets onto UAP-related programs
Under the Atomic Energy Act, objects with radiological energy emissions fall under the same secrecy provisions as nuclear weapons
Manhattan Project personnel were receiving UFO reports and functioned similarly to Project Blue Book
Some colleagues have grandparents who handled UFO reports while working on the Manhattan Project
